name: Fenris || Injured
description:
"I shouldn’t trouble you with this. My problems are not yours…" || 🗡️⛓️

_______________

In which you come across Fenris whilst he’s injured. And if it wasn’t bad enough… you’re also a mage…

_______________

haha guess who got another hyperfixation — I like elf men. there I said it. bonus if they got white hair and a depressing backstory.

the idea is that you two have met before, but how deep your relationship is; that’s up to you.

TW; Fenris is injured + he might get aggressive with you on account of you being a mage…
